metadata.title: Toison D'or Georgian Café & Restaurant in Geneva
metadata.description: Discover an authentic and unforgettable culinary experience inspired by Georgian tradition and crafted with love. At Toison D'or in Geneva, enjoy Georgian specialties, from traditional dishes to modern creations, in a warm and elegant atmosphere.

hero.text: Immerse yourself in a unique Georgian culinary world where each dish is carefully prepared using the finest ingredients, bringing the flavors of Georgia to Geneva.

componentOne.text: Meet our Chef, who brings the warmth of homemade Georgian flavors to every dish. Each recipe, prepared with care and a touch of nostalgia, tastes like a meal made by a loving grandmother. His devotion to freshness and authenticity makes every meal comforting and unforgettable.

componentTwo.title1: A Private Space at Your Disposal
componentTwo.text1: Toison D'or offers you the possibility to rent a part of the restaurant with an independent entrance. We offer great flexibility: you can opt for our Georgian specialties to delight your guests or bring your own dishes and enjoy the space in a warm atmosphere.
componentTwo.text2: For your private events, we provide a dedicated space in our restaurant. Whether you want full service with our Georgian dishes or prefer to use your own preparations, we guarantee a unique and welcoming experience.

1.title: Gastronomic Journey in Georgia
1.text: Georgian cuisine is a vibrant and colorful journey based on recipes passed down from generation to generation. Each dish combines fresh ingredients, spices, and traditions to create a unique experience where food is more than just a meal; it's a cultural expression.

2.title: Discover Georgia at Toison D'or
2.text: At Toison D'or, we invite you to savor Georgian heritage with our authentic dishes and a friendly atmosphere. Each bite is a step into the soul of Georgia, where tradition and modernity blend to celebrate the flavors and stories of this magical country.

componentSeven.text1: Georgian viticulture is among the oldest in the world, with roots dating back over 8,000 years. The earliest traces of winemaking reveal the use of the kvevri, large buried clay jars, marking one of the first winemaking methods in the world. Archaeological discoveries suggest that this region could be the cradle of wine and domesticated vines. Today, Georgian vineyards cover about 100,000 hectares, and the country has 540 authenticated grape varieties. A large part of the wines is still produced according to this ancestral method, perpetuating a unique know-how and a strong connection with its traditions.

metadata.title: Discover Our Menu
metadata.description: Browse our menu and savor the best of our Georgian creations, crafted with fresh ingredients and a touch of traditional flavors.

metadata.title: Our Story
metadata.description: Discover the roots of our passion for Georgian cuisine and how we became a renowned restaurant in Geneva, blending tradition and innovation.

componentTwo.title1: Bringing Georgia to the Heart of Geneva
componentTwo.title2: A Journey of Flavors and Heritage
componentTwo.text1: Georgian culture and cuisine are my true passions, and sharing them is a dream come true. Here in Geneva, I am delighted to bring a taste of my homeland, offering each guest an authentic experience filled with warmth, tradition, and the unique flavors of Georgia.
componentTwo.text2: With years of experience as a chef, I have had the honor of representing Georgian gastronomy at many events. Today, I invite you to explore the rich culinary heritage of Georgia at Toison D'or, where each dish is designed to tell a story and offer an unforgettable experience.

1.title: Georgia: Land of Culture and Gastronomy
1.text: Located between Europe and Asia, Georgia is a country with ancient roots and unique traditions. Unified in the 4th century with the union of Colchis and Iberia, Georgia has developed a strong and resilient identity. Despite numerous invasions, it has preserved its rich cultural heritage through the centuries.

2.title: History and Unification
2.text: The history of Georgia is marked by unity and resilience. In the 4th century, Colchis and Iberia united, forming a country defined by enduring beliefs and traditions. Despite repeated invasions, Georgia's unique identity remains strong, embracing its diverse heritage while preserving its ancient essence.

3.title: Culture and Legends
3.text: Georgia is the birthplace of the legend of the Golden Fleece, a symbol of dreams and abundance tied to Greek mythology. This story links Georgia to ancient Greece, attracting myth lovers to this enchanted land where culture and history blend harmoniously in its landscapes and traditions.

4.title: A Living Heritage
4.text: Georgian heritage is expressed through its architecture, traditional dances, polyphonic songs, and renowned cuisine. These cultural expressions not only preserve Georgian identity but also captivate visitors, revealing the rich history and vibrant spirit that make Georgia unique.

5.title: Georgian Cuisine
5.text: Renowned for its flavors and spices, Georgian cuisine uses fresh ingredients and recipes passed down for generations. Each dish holds cultural significance, with some like khachapuri and khinkali recognized by UNESCO as symbols of the country's rich culinary tradition.

6.title: Iconic Dishes of Georgia
6.text: Georgian dishes reflect the nation's heritage: khachapuri, a hot cheese-filled bread; khinkali, juicy meat dumplings; and bread baked in 'tone' ovens. Each recipe, treasured for generations, brings the unique flavors and cultural importance of Georgia to the table.

componentSeven.text1: Georgian viticulture is among the oldest in the world, with roots dating back over 8,000 years. The earliest evidence of winemaking reveals the use of the kvevri, large buried clay jars, marking one of the earliest winemaking methods in the world. Archaeological discoveries suggest that this region may be the birthplace of wine and domesticated vines. Today, Georgian vineyards cover approximately 100,000 hectares, and the country boasts 540 authenticated grape varieties. Much of the wine is still made using this ancestral method, preserving a unique craftsmanship and strong connection to tradition.

metadata.title: Reserve a Table
metadata.description: Reserve a table with us today and enjoy the finest Georgian specialties in a warm atmosphere in the heart of Geneva.

componentNine.title: Book Your Table
componentNine.text: Reserve your seat and enjoy our sustainably prepared Georgian cuisine made with love. We look forward to welcoming you!

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Find out how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in accordance with GDPR. Your privacy is our priority.

testimonials.title2: What our guests say about us
